questions.question: How does a ViT turn an image into a sequence of tokens?
questions.questionZh: 视觉Transformer（Vision Transformer）是如何将图像转换为词元（token）序列的？
options: Flattens the entire image into one vector
Applies a conv with kernel_size = stride = patch_size to split the image into non-overlapping patches and linearly project each to a token embedding in one operation
Runs a CNN first and uses its feature map as tokens
optionsZh: 将整个图像展平（Flatten）为一个向量（Vector）。
应用一个卷积（convolution）操作，设置 kernel_size = stride = patch_size，通过单次操作将图像分割为不重叠的图像块（patches），并将每个图像块线性投影（linear projection）为词元嵌入（token embedding）。
首先运行卷积神经网络 (CNN)，并将其特征图 (feature map) 作为词元 (token)。
对像素强度 (pixel intensities) 进行排序
questions.explanation: The first layer of a ViT is a conv with kernel_size = stride = 16, turning a 224x224 image into a 14x14 grid of 16x16 patches, each projected to dim=768. That single conv does both patchification and projection. The result is 196 tokens that a standard transformer encoder can process.
questions.explanationZh: ViT（Vision Transformer）的第一层是一个卷积层（conv），其卷积核大小（kernel_size）与步长（stride）均设为 16。该层将 224x224 的图像转换为 14x14 的网格，每个网格对应一个 16x16 的图像块（patch），并将每个图像块投影至维度（dim）为 768 的特征空间。这单个卷积层同时完成了图像分块（patchification）与投影（projection）。最终输出 196 个词元（token），可供标准的 Transformer 编码器（transformer encoder）进行处理。

questions.question: What is the [CLS] token in ViT and why is it needed?
questions.questionZh: ViT（Vision Transformer）中的 [CLS] 词元（token）是什么？为什么需要它？
options: A learned vector prepended to the token sequence; after N transformer layers its output aggregates the whole image and feeds the classifier head
optionsZh: 一个可学习向量（learned vector）被前置到词元序列（token sequence）的开头；经过 N 个 Transformer 层（transformer layers）后，其输出将聚合整张图像的全局信息，并输入至分类器头（classifier head）。
特殊像素值
缺失数据 (missing data) 占位符 (placeholder)
一个丢弃掩码（Dropout Mask）
questions.explanation: ViT follows BERT's convention: prepend a learned vector (the CLS token) to the patch sequence. Self-attention lets every token see every other token, so the CLS token aggregates global information from all patches. The classifier reads only the CLS output. Alternative designs use average-pooling over all patch tokens (used by ConvNeXt and many post-ViT models).
questions.explanationZh: 视觉Transformer（Vision Transformer, ViT）沿用了 BERT 的惯例：在图像块序列（patch sequence）开头添加一个可学习向量（learned vector），即分类标记（CLS token）。自注意力机制（Self-attention）使得每个标记（token）都能关注到其他所有标记，因此分类标记（CLS token）能够聚合来自所有图像块的全局信息。分类器（classifier）仅读取分类标记（CLS token）的输出。替代设计方案则对所有图像块标记进行平均池化（average-pooling）（ConvNeXt 及众多后 ViT 模型（post-ViT models）均采用此设计）。

questions.question: Why did the original ViT paper need JFT-300M pretraining to beat ResNet, and why does DeiT not?
questions.questionZh: 为什么最初的视觉 Transformer (ViT) 论文需要 JFT-300M 预训练才能超越残差网络 (ResNet)，而数据高效图像 Transformer (DeiT) 却不需要？
options: ViT has weaker inductive biases than CNNs; without enough data it overfits. DeiT showed that with strong augmentation (RandAugment, Mixup, CutMix), stochastic depth, and optionally CNN distillation, ViTs train fine on ImageNet-1k alone
optionsZh: 没有 JFT-300M 数据集，ViT（Vision Transformer）将无法正常工作。

与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相比，视觉 Transformer (ViT) 的归纳偏置 (inductive bias) 较弱；在数据不足时容易过拟合 (overfit)。数据高效图像 Transformer (DeiT) 的研究表明，结合强数据增强 (strong augmentation)（如 RandAugment、Mixup、CutMix）、随机深度 (stochastic depth) 以及可选的 CNN 蒸馏 (CNN distillation)，仅使用 ImageNet-1k 数据集即可使 ViT 取得良好的训练效果。
DeiT 采用了不同的注意力机制 (attention mechanism)。
ViT（Vision Transformer）论文存在错误
questions.explanation: ViT's lack of inductive bias (no locality, no translation equivariance baked in) means the network has to learn these from data. With 1M ImageNet images that is hard; with 300M JFT images it is easy. DeiT replaced the data with training-recipe improvements: heavy augmentation, stochastic depth, and distillation from a CNN teacher, all of which compensate for the lack of priors.
questions.explanationZh: ViT 缺乏归纳偏置（inductive bias），即未内置局部性（locality）与平移等变性（translation equivariance），这意味着网络必须从数据中学习这些特性。在仅有 100 万张 ImageNet 图像的情况下，这很难实现；但在拥有 3 亿张 JFT 图像时，则变得容易。DeiT 通过改进训练策略（training recipe）来替代对海量数据的依赖：包括强数据增强（heavy augmentation）、随机深度（stochastic depth）以及从 CNN 教师模型（CNN teacher）进行知识蒸馏（distillation），所有这些方法都弥补了模型缺乏先验（priors）的不足。

questions.question: Pre-LayerNorm (`x = x + sublayer(LN(x))`) vs post-LayerNorm (`x = LN(x + sublayer(x))`) — which is used in modern transformers and why?
questions.questionZh: 前置层归一化（Pre-LayerNorm）（`x = x + sublayer(LN(x))`）与后置层归一化（Post-LayerNorm）（`x = LN(x + sublayer(x))`）——现代 Transformer（Transformer）架构中采用的是哪一种？原因是什么？
options: Pre-LN; it trains deeper networks stably without learning-rate warmup and avoids the gradient instabilities that post-LN suffers past about 6 layers
optionsZh: 后层归一化（Post-LN）；其结构更为简单
预层归一化（Pre-LN）；它无需学习率预热（learning rate warmup）即可稳定训练更深的网络，并避免了后层归一化（Post-LN）在层数超过约 6 层时出现的梯度不稳定（gradient instability）问题。
它们完全相同。
两者都不是；现代 Transformer 架构已跳过层归一化（LayerNorm）。
questions.explanation: Post-LN was the original transformer (2017) and required careful warmup + small learning rates past 6-8 layers. Pre-LN (Xiong et al., 2020; used by ViT, GPT-2+, every modern LLM) is numerically more stable: the residual stream accumulates without passing through LN, and each sublayer operates on a normalised input. Every transformer deeper than 12 layers uses pre-LN.
questions.explanationZh: 后归一化（Post-LN）是原始 Transformer（2017）采用的架构，当网络深度超过 6-8 层时，需要谨慎的学习率预热（warmup）和较小的学习率（learning rate）。前归一化（Pre-LN）（Xiong 等人，2020；被 ViT、GPT-2+ 及所有现代大语言模型（LLM）采用）具有更高的数值稳定性：残差流（residual stream）的累积无需经过层归一化（LN），且每个子层（sublayer）均基于归一化输入（normalized input）进行计算。目前，所有深度超过 12 层的 Transformer 均采用前归一化（Pre-LN）。

questions.question: Swin Transformer introduces windowed attention. What problem does it solve?
questions.questionZh: Swin Transformer 引入了窗口注意力（Windowed Attention）。它旨在解决什么问题？
options: Full attention has O((H*W)^2) cost; Swin restricts attention to local windows of 7x7 patches, reducing cost to O(H*W * window^2). Alternating blocks shift the window by half its size so information eventually mixes across the image
optionsZh: 梯度消失 (vanishing gradients)
全局注意力 (Full Attention) 的计算复杂度为 O((H*W)^2)；Swin Transformer (Swin) 将注意力机制限制在 7x7 图像块 (Patches) 的局部窗口内，从而将计算复杂度降低至 O(H*W * window^2)。交替模块 (Alternating Blocks) 会将窗口平移其尺寸的一半，从而使信息最终能够在整幅图像中充分交互。
不支持批归一化 (BatchNorm)
对纹理的过拟合 (Overfitting to texture)
questions.explanation: A 224x224 image with 4x4 patches has 56*56 = 3136 tokens; full attention is 3136^2 = ~10M pairs per layer. Swin attends only within 7x7 windows, giving 49^2 = 2401 pairs per window (plus the window count). Shifted windows in alternating blocks mix information across windows over a few layers. This brings a CNN-like locality prior back to the transformer without giving up attention.
questions.explanationZh: 一张 224x224 的图像若划分为 4x4 的图像块 (patches)，将生成 56*56 = 3136 个标记 (tokens)；此时全局注意力 (full attention) 每层需计算 3136^2 ≈ 1000 万对配对 (pairs)。Swin Transformer (Swin) 仅在 7x7 窗口内计算注意力，每个窗口仅产生 49^2 = 2401 对配对（再乘以窗口总数）。通过在交替的模块中引入移位窗口 (shifted windows)，信息得以在经过若干层后实现跨窗口融合。这一设计在保留注意力机制的同时，成功将类似卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的局部性先验 (locality prior) 重新引入 Transformer 架构中。
